Operation 'getInsuranceClaimDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is too brief and lacks context about what claim information is returned and what the parameters represent. Added clarity about required parameters and expected output to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and when to use it.

data.current_description: Retrieve insurance claim details for a specific prescription fill.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve insurance claim details associated with a specific prescription fill. Requires the prescription token and fill number to identify the claim. Returns claim information including status, amounts, and insurance processing details.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks context about what claim information is returned and what the parameters represent. Added clarity about required parameters and expected output to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and when to use it.

message: Operation 'listTransferRequests' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description mentions pagination but doesn't explain what data is returned or how pagination parameters work. Enhanced description clarifies the return format and pagination mechanism to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of transfer requests with optional pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all transfer requests. Supports optional pagination parameters to control result set size and offset. Returns an array of transfer request objects with their current status and details.
data.reasoning: The current description mentions pagination but doesn't explain what data is returned or how pagination parameters work. Enhanced description clarifies the return format and pagination mechanism to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getTransferRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is minimal and doesn't specify what information is returned. Added details about the return object structure and what data fields are included to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific transfer request by its token.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific transfer request using its transfer token. Returns the complete transfer request object including status, prescription details, source pharmacy information, and transfer history.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and doesn't specify what information is returned. Added details about the return object structure and what data fields are included to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

message: Operation 'createDirectTransfer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks clarity about the operation's mechanics and effects. Enhanced description explains that this is a direct transfer (no patient approval needed), specifies required inputs, and clarifies the return value and side effects of the operation.

data.current_description: Programmatic transfer of a prescription from your pharmacy to FuzeRx pharmacy.
data.description_suggestion: Initiate a direct prescription transfer from your pharmacy to FuzeRx pharmacy. Requires prescription and pharmacy identifiers. Transfers the prescription record directly without requiring patient approval. Returns confirmation details including transfer status and tracking information.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about the operation's mechanics and effects. Enhanced description explains that this is a direct transfer (no patient approval needed), specifies required inputs, and clarifies the return value and side effects of the operation.

message: Operation 'getFillRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is too generic and doesn't specify what information is returned. Added details about the return object structure and key fields to help AI agents understand what data they can expect from this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific fill request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific fill request using its request ID. Returns the complete fill request object including medication details, patient information, fulfillment status, and shipping information.
data.reasoning: The current description is too generic and doesn't specify what information is returned. Added details about the return object structure and key fields to help AI agents understand what data they can expect from this operation.

message: Operation 'findPatient' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about which demographic fields are searchable and what the response contains. Enhanced description specifies searchable fields, clarifies the use case (lookup without token), and explains what is returned to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus getPatient.

data.current_description: Search for patient information by demographic fields without a patient_token.
data.description_suggestion: Search for an existing patient record using demographic fields (name, date of birth, contact information, etc.) when a patient_token is not available. Returns matching patient records with their details and patient_token for use in subsequent API requests. Useful for patient lookup before authentication.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about which demographic fields are searchable and what the response contains. Enhanced description specifies searchable fields, clarifies the use case (lookup without token), and explains what is returned to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus getPatient.

message: Operation 'updatePatient' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description explains constraints but lacks clarity on what fields CAN be updated, whether partial updates are supported, and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies updateable fields, confirms partial update support, specifies the return value, and improves AI agent understanding of operation capabilities.

data.current_description: Updates a patient record. Only non-required fields can be updated (first_name, last_name, dob, gender cannot be changed).
data.description_suggestion: Updates a patient record using the patient_token. Only non-required fields can be modified; immutable fields include first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, and gender. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be changed. Returns the updated patient record with all current information.
data.reasoning: Current description explains constraints but lacks clarity on what fields CAN be updated, whether partial updates are supported, and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies updateable fields, confirms partial update support, specifies the return value, and improves AI agent understanding of operation capabilities.

message: Operation 'getPatientSurvey' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current summary and description lack context about what the survey contains and why it matters. Enhanced summary is more specific. Enhanced description explains the survey's purpose (safety screening), what information it captures (allergies, conditions), its clinical importance, and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in safety-critical workflows.

data.current_description: Retrieve the patient safety survey information for a patient.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the patient safety survey information for a patient using their patient_token. This survey captures drug allergies, medical conditions, and other safety-critical information used to prevent adverse drug interactions and ensure safe medication dispensing.
